final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: professional food photography, commercial editorial, square crop
Primary request: macro close-up of a plated Michelin three-star French main course — slow-cooked duck breast with truffle sauce
Scene/backdrop: dark marble countertop surface, upscale fine-dining restaurant ambiance
Subject: neatly sliced duck breast with perfectly golden-brown crispy skin and blush-pink juicy interior; garnished with micro-vegetable garden décor including baby carrots, purple chicory leaves, and edible flowers; fresh black truffle shavings layered on top; truffle sauce artistically smeared along the rim of a white bone-china plate
Style/medium: photorealistic commercial food photography, 35mm macro lens
Composition/framing: macro close-up, shallow depth of field, sharp focus precisely on the cross-section texture of the duck breast slices, slight side angle
Lighting/mood: dramatic side lighting that rakes across the dish, highlighting the crispy skin texture and sauce gloss; luxurious, moody, high-end restaurant atmosphere
Color palette: deep charcoal marble background + warm golden-brown skin + blush pink meat + deep black truffle + vivid purple chicory + bright accent edible flowers + ivory white plate rim
Materials/textures: crispy rendered duck skin with visible crackling texture, glistening truffle sauce with wet sheen, matte bone-china plate surface, cool dark marble veining
Constraints: focus must remain on the duck breast cross-section; plate rim sauce smear and truffle shavings must be clearly visible; no human hands in frame
Avoid: flat lighting, oversaturated cartoon-like colors, cluttered background, watermark
